channel.title: Blogs on Pranav Gore | Senior Backend Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Pranav Gore | Senior Backend Engineer

item.title: Writing custom VSCode plugin
item.description: A practical walkthrough of building a custom Visual Studio Code extension — from scaffolding to shipping a working developer utility.

item.title: When & why to use PyAutoGUI
item.description: When PyAutoGUI is the right tool for desktop GUI automation and testing — practical use cases, limitations, and a getting-started walkthrough.

item.title: Video File Operations with FFmpeg
item.description: Common FFmpeg video processing operations: trimming, merging, format conversion, resolution scaling, and extracting audio from video files.

item.title: Python code translator 2 to 3
item.description: How to use Python's built-in 2to3 tool to automatically translate a Python 2 codebase to Python 3 syntax with minimal manual effort.

item.title: Record Screen and Audio using FFmpeg on macOS
item.description: Step-by-step guide to recording your screen and system audio on macOS using FFmpeg from the command line — no third-party software required.

item.title: X virtual framebuffer (Xvfb)
item.description: What Xvfb (X Virtual Framebuffer) is, how it works, and how to use it to run GUI applications in headless Linux environments for CI/CD pipelines and testing.

item.title: Exported but Restricted inside `internal` package.
item.description: Understanding Go's internal package mechanism — how exported symbols can be restricted to specific import paths, and when to use blank and dot imports.

item.title: Prevent accidental git-push in a simple step
item.description: A one-line git configuration trick to prevent accidentally pushing to an upstream repository you don't intend to touch.

item.title: Update golang version on Fedora
item.description: How to safely update your Go installation on Fedora Linux while keeping the old version as a fallback.
